Wine Route

Durbanville Luxury Manor

The heart of Cape Town's Northern Suburbs.
Combining top school districts, vineyards, and high security.

Project Overview

Durbanville is famous for its rolling vineyards and world-class wineries. This area hosts the best public and private schools in Cape Town (e.g., Reddam House) and is the top choice for affluent families. Located within a Gated Community with 24/7 armed security, ensuring asset value and family safety.

Price Approx.

ZAR 16.5M

Proj. Growth

8% p.a.

Specs

4 Bed, 3 Bath

Plot Size

850 m²

Gallery

Request Info Pack

Includes: ROI Calculation, Floor Plans, and Community Rules.
